programmes.show_description: ...Fair: (2021) Jane Schoenbrun's creepy, freaky, coming-of-age horror starring Anna Cobb. A lonely teenage girl gets increasingly sucked into the unnerving nether-world of an online game.

(1968) Carol Reed's evergreen musical based on Charles Dickens' Oliver Twist, with Mark Lester starring as the young orphan in Victorian London. With Ron Moody and Oliver Reed.
...Special: Oscar-winning actor Rami Malek discusses playing Freddie Mercury in the rock biopic about the rise of the band Queen.
(1972) Action adventure. Gene Hackman stars as a priest who leads a ragtag group of survivors on a life-or-death quest to escape from the capsized ocean liner Poseidon.
...Special: Rami Malek discusses playing Freddie Mercury in the rock biopic about the rise of the band Queen.

programmes.show_name: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programmes.show_description: (1993) Comedy sequel starring Whoopi Goldberg and Lauryn Hill. Deloris - who's now made it big in Vegas - goes back undercover as a teacher to help a struggling school choir find its voice.
...Special: Rami Malek discusses playing Freddie Mercury in the rock biopic about the rise of the band Queen.
(2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.
(2023) Darkly comic ursine misadventure about a disparate group of people who happen across a coked-up bear - aka Pablo Eskobear - in the American wilderness. With Keri Russell.
(2023) Gritty crime thriller with Dale Dickey. An elderly couple get fleeced for their house and savings, so granny - aka The G - goes on a vengeful rampage. Be careful who you mess with.
(2009) Michael Mann directs Johnny Depp as infamous bank robber John Dillinger; Marion Cotillard as Dillinger's sorta girl; and Christian Bale as the FBI agent trying to put him away.

...Return: A time travelling mission to prevent the eradication of deafness failed. Time is running out. A hero gathers allies for the ultimate confrontation.
Teleshopping.
(1971) Film version of the popular comedy series set in 1940. The Walmington-on-Sea Home Guard, led by Arthur Lowe's Captain Mainwaring, bumble through a series of misadventures.
(2019) Animated spy comedy caper with the voice of Will Smith. The 'world's most awesome spy' gets framed and has to go undercover as a pigeon to prove his innocence.
(2007) Animated comedy. When Homer's love for a pig causes world-threatening pollution, Springfield gets enclosed in a huge dome. D'oh! Will he do the decent thing and save his neighbours?
(2003) Family comedy. Steve Martin and Bonnie Hunt star as parents to 12 children. Things go well until their careers take off, when their chaotic lives start to spiral out of control.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
(2022) Daisy Edgar-Jones stars in director Olivia Newman's adaptation of Delia Owens' best-selling novel about a feral child who's accused of murder in America's Deep South. Did she do it?
